data.title: Bybit Hack Damage Is Being Minimized Thanks To Support From Big Guys
data.description:
The Bybit hack saw $1.4 billion stolen, but the crypto community, including Binance, Bitget, and MEXC, quickly provided support to stabilize operations.
source: https://coincu.com/323636-bybit-hack-damage-is-being-minimized

data.title: North Korea’s Lazarus Group behind hack as Bybit loses $1.5B
data.description:
Key takeaways Bybit suffered the biggest theft of all time in the crypto space after losing $1.5 billion to hackers on Friday.  The Bitcoin Pepe presale is now approaching $3 million as more investors pile in. Bybit suffers the biggest theft of all time in the crypto space Bybit, one of the leading cryptocurrency exchanges […]
The post North Korea’s Lazarus Group behind hack as Bybit loses...
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/north-koreas-lazarus-group-behind-hack-as-bybit-loses-1-5b/

data.title: Bitunix Responds Swiftly to Bybit Security Breach
data.description: According to Odaily, following the security breach at Bybit, Bitunix promptly took action by blacklisting the hacker's addresses to prevent further money laundering activities on its platform. Bitunix expressed its willingness to offer any possible assistance to help safeguard the industry's security and stability.

data.title: US stock market crashes in its worst day since 2024
data.description:
The US stock market collapsed on Friday, posting its worst single-day loss since December 2024, as traders dumped risk assets on fears of a weakening economy and stubborn inflation, as new economic data showed shaky consumer confidence, declining home sales, and slowing business activity—all while the White House ramped up its tariff war. By the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/us-stock-market-crashes-worst-day-since-2024/

data.title: Circle Reports Increase In USDC Circulation
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 2.1 billion USDC and redeemed around 2 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to February 20, 2025. This activity resulted in a net increase of about 100 million USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 56.1 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $56.4 billion. Of these reserves, about $6.9 billion is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately $49.5 billion.

data.title: Trump revives tariff probe over foreign digital taxes on US Tech
data.description:
President Trump wants the US Trade Representative's office to open investigations on foreign nations imposing DSTs on their tech companies.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-revives-tariff-probe-digital-taxes/

data.title: 36,000 ETH transferred from Binance hot wallet to Bybit cold wallet in the past 15 minutes
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to LookonChain monitoring, another 36,000 ETH (worth US$96.5 million) were transferred from Binance hot wallet to Bybit cold wallet in the past 15 minutes.

data.title: Planet Lunch News

Crypto KOL clarifies: The $1.38 billion in funds in the Bybit hacker address are still on the Ethereum mainnet, and the previous cross-chain transfer of funds to Solana was due to misleading by others
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Crypto KOL issued a clarification that he was misled by @barneyxbt's post and his previous analysis of Bybit hackers using the Solana network and Kanye Meme coins to launder money was wrong. He said that the ETH funds worth $1.38 billion on the Bybit hacker address are still on the Ethereum mainnet, and he has deleted the previous analysis tweet.

data.title: Clarification Issued on Bybit Hack and Solana Network Misunderstanding
data.description: According to Odaily, a prominent figure in the cryptocurrency community has clarified previous statements regarding the Bybit hack. The individual explained that earlier analyses suggesting the use of the Solana network and Kanye Meme tokens for laundering funds were misleading, influenced by a post from @barneyxbt. It was confirmed that the $1.38 billion in ETH associated with the Bybit hacker remains on the Ethereum mainnet. The initial analysis tweets have since been deleted.
